title: Wealth Management AI Pain Points 2026
content: Wealth managers report fragmented client data, slow product comparison, and weak personalization as the top pain points. Advisor productivity improved 18% in pilots that used AI agents for research summaries and client meeting preparation. Assets under management growth remained 7% in the surveyed digital wealth cohort. The report recommends traceable citations for every investment-related recommendation.

title: Digital Finance AI Implementation Guideline
content: Financial institutions should build centralized AI governance for model demand, testing, deployment, evaluation, and exit. AI systems in wealth management must keep auditable evidence, human review paths, and clear risk warnings. Regulatory constraints mean an AI agent cannot provide unqualified investment advice without suitability checks and compliance review.

title: Company Case Notes on AI Wealth Assistants
content: A bank pilot used planner-researcher-writer agents to summarize fund factsheets, compare products, and prepare relationship manager scripts. Advisor productivity improved 31% after the assistant was embedded in daily workflows. The project team emphasized source traceability, latency budgets, and manual approval for high-risk suggestions.

title: Revolut AI Advisor Product Update
content: Consumer fintech products are experimenting with AI guidance for budgeting, portfolio explanation, and financial education. The stronger use cases are education and explanation rather than direct trade recommendations. Product teams expect adoption to grow when citations, opt-outs, and audit logs become visible to users.

title: RAG Citation Evaluation Engineering Note
content: A production evaluation harness should track citation accuracy, faithfulness, answer relevance, context recall, cost, latency, and token use. One benchmark reached 94% citation accuracy at $0.62 per long research task. Teams used LLM-as-Judge plus deterministic citation verification to classify bad cases into retrieval miss, hallucination, citation error, and reasoning gap.

title: Old Wealth Automation Survey
content: The 2024 survey estimated advisor productivity improved 12% when teams used automation for report drafting. It expected the market could double by 2027 if compliance and client trust barriers were solved. These figures are useful historical context but should not be treated as current evidence.

title: Model Risk Governance Memo for Financial AI
content: Model risk governance requires documented data lineage, evaluation records, monitoring, fallback plans, and human accountability. However, AI agents may amplify unsuitable recommendations if retrieval results are stale or user risk profiles are incomplete. Audit logs and citation verification are mandatory controls for high-impact financial use cases.

title: Multi-Agent Framework Comparison for Deep Research
content: Planner-researcher-critic-reporter architectures help long-horizon research tasks by separating decomposition, evidence gathering, quality control, and synthesis. Checkpointing reduces recovery cost when tasks exceed 30 steps. The paper recommends max critic iterations, retry queues, and explicit evidence stores instead of relying on vector memory alone.

title: 宁德时代 2024 年业绩摘要
content: 宁德时代 2024 年累计营业收入为 3620.13 亿元。宁德时代 2024 年累计归母净利润为 507.45 亿元。宁德时代 2024 年累计净利润为 520.00 亿元。宁德时代 2024 年单季归母净利润为 105.10 亿元。

title: 宁德时代 2024 年利润口径快评
content: 宁德时代 2024 年累计归母净利润为 410.00 亿元。该数字与公司摘要存在差异，需要回到官方结构化数据源核查。宁德时代 2024 年累计扣非净利润为 450.00 亿元。

title: 宁德时代欧洲工厂扩张跟踪 A
content: 宁德时代 欧洲工厂 投产日期为2025年6月。扩张节奏影响海外供应链验证和资本开支节奏。

title: 宁德时代欧洲工厂扩张跟踪 B
content: 宁德时代 欧洲工厂 投产日期为2025年9月。报道同时提醒读者关注产能爬坡时间和客户认证进度。

title: 宁德时代业绩研究风险提示
content: However, battery demand, raw material prices, overseas certification, and customer concentration remain key risks. Research output should label data periods and accounting dimensions, and it does not constitute investment advice.
